    Constant Field
    Value
    public static final String
    REGEX_COMMAND
    "[:]?[a-zA-Z]+[a-zA-Z0-9_-]*"
    public static final String
    REGEX_VARIABLE
    "[a-zA-Z_]+[a-zA-Z0-9_-]*"
